data.current_description: Returns quota information for the authenticated account. Requests to this endpoint do not count against your quota or rate limit.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the current API status and quota information for the authenticated account. Returns quota details including usage metrics and limits. This endpoint does not consume quota or count against rate limits, making it safe to call for monitoring purposes.
data.reasoning: The current description is incomplete for AI agent interpretability. It mentions quota information but doesn't specify what quota details are returned (e.g., usage metrics, limits). message: Operation 'takeScreenshot' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. The current description lacks critical details for AI agent decision-making. It doesn't specify: (1) what formats are supported, (2) what the operation returns (binary image file), (3) that it consumes quota, or (4) the scope of customization (full-page vs. viewport). The improved description provides concrete parameter examples, clarifies the return type, and includes the side effect of quota consumption, enabling better agent routing and execution planning.

data.current_description: Capture a screenshot of a website with customizable options including format, viewport size, delays, and content blocking.
data.description_suggestion: Captures a full-page website screenshot with extensive customization options. Accepts parameters for output format (PNG, JPEG, WEBP), viewport dimensions, rendering delays, and content blocking preferences. Returns the screenshot as a binary image file in the requested format. Consumes one quota unit per successful request.
